violations.text: Miscellaneous prepared food items delivered to establishment were observed not held under refrigeration. Food items were observed held at (55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The floor in the sales area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2026

Suki sauce, and pickled cabbage. Was observed for sale, invoices could not be provided for items. Unapproved source - Items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the produce case, and open air cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
Receipts were not provided for blood jelly and fish eggs. Disposed. English Approved Food Source Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Numerous foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels, or have labels that are incomplete. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen . Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and toilet room were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Unlabeled meats, fish, blood jelly, fish eggs, and jars of suki sauce were observed in freezer and on shelf. PIC unable to produce receipts. Food was embargoed pending proof of source. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as bamboo, tofu) in the self service refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Numerous foods such as rices, crispy noodles, meats, fish, fish eggs, and produce packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
Food observed stored on the floor in areas of the market. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Self service bins of tofu and bamboo were observed without protection from consumers. FOOD on display shall be protected from contamination by the use of PACKAGING; counter, service line, or salad bar FOOD guards; display cases; or other effective means. Open bins were removed from self service area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

The rice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (check out counter) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Rice scoop was taken to the kitchen to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
Drain plugs are lacking for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
Dumpster are has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. Dumpster areas must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

The area outside the kitchen door has an accumulation of unused items, wood pallets, litter, leaf litter, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The kitchen construction is not yet completed, including the ceiling unfinished above the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

The floor in the market is in poor repair, with tiles broken or missing, exposing the wood subflooring below. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
Ceiling tiles in the market are in poor repair, stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2023
